resources.string: *Font weight adjustments may not fully apply to some fonts
Not supported on current device, requires Android 12+
System color extraction disabled, theme color can be adjusted freely
Change the position of floating buttons and pages
Backup and share full data to other apps or devices
A minimalist note-taking app for rapid thought capture.
Deleted notes are stored here. Swipe right on a note card to restore it.
Please wait while Synap imports the shared data.
Note: Due to system limitations, switching icons may cause the app to crash back to the desktop.
Icon switched. It will refresh automatically when you return to the desktop.
Warning! Importing a backup file will clear all existing data. Please proceed with caution. App restart required after import.
Backup data imported successfully. Restart the app to apply.
Cannot share database at this time
Cannot import database at this time
Show tag filter bar on home screen
This option only applies to phone layout, not large screen layout
Works with most domestic phone systems
Works with OneUI and similar stock Android systems
Manually configure the scan app package name
Choose alignment for certain widgets (toolbar, FAB, etc.)
Please enter the package name of your system scan app below (do not enter WeChat, QQ, etc.).
Use lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens or underscores
Leave empty if you manage authentication via request headers
Optional. Customize the service name. If left empty, the service ID will be used as the name.
Optional. Customize the model name. If left empty, the model ID will be used as the name.
Please enter an OpenAI-compatible API link.
You haven\'t saved your current note. Please choose an action.
We detected that your last edit was not saved. It has been auto-saved to drafts. Please choose how to handle it:
I have read and agree to the above Terms of Use

Synap Terms of Use

Last Updated: June 12, 2026
Effective Date: June 12, 2026
Developer: Xiamen Tongan Yunshang Huanke Network Technology Studio

Thank you for using the Synap software (hereinafter referred to as "this software"). This agreement is a legal agreement between you and the developer regarding downloading, installing, and using this software. Please read this agreement carefully, especially the clauses related to data security, privacy protection, and limitation of liability. Once you start using this software, you agree to be bound by all terms of this agreement.

1. Service Description

1.1 This software is a local-first note-taking tool with core features including note creation, editing, management, search, and multiple data synchronization methods.

1.2 Network Activity Declaration

Manual Cloud Sync: You can manually enable the "Server Cloud Sync" feature. In this case, the software will transmit your note data to your designated server after end-to-end encryption. Apart from this, the software will not automatically connect to the internet or upload any data in the background.

LAN Sync: You can manually pair with other devices on your local network and transfer data directly over the local network. This process does not go through any external server; data is transmitted only between your devices.

Other Features: The software will not initiate any undisclosed network requests for crash reporting, advertising, analytics, or other purposes.

1.3 Share to Create Note

When you select text in other apps and choose this software via the "Share" feature, the software will receive the text and quickly create a new note. This operation is only saved locally and will not be automatically uploaded to the cloud.

1.4 QR Code Scanner

After tapping "Scan QR Code", the software will invoke the system-level scanning application installed on your device (such as the system camera or default scanning tool) to complete QR code scanning. The software does not process or store the raw scanned images.

1.5 Backup and Restore

Restore Backup: You can select a backup file with the .redb extension through the system file picker. The software will read the file and restore note data. Please ensure the backup file is from a reliable source to avoid security risks from restoring unknown files.

Create Backup: The backup file generated by the software is also in .redb format and is stored by default in your device's local storage.

2. Data Security and Privacy

2.1 Encryption Mechanism

All data uploaded to the server via "Manual Cloud Sync" is end-to-end encrypted on your device before transmission. The encryption key is stored only on your local device; neither the developer nor any third party can decrypt your note content.

2.2 Local-First Principle

Your note data is saved only on your local device by default. Data leaves your device only when you explicitly agree to trigger or manually trigger "Manual Cloud Sync" or "LAN Sync".

2.3 Permission Description

Network Permission: Only for manually triggered cloud sync and LAN pairing.

Storage Permission: For reading/writing .redb backup files (requires system file picker) and storing the note database.

Camera Permission: Only invoked when you use the "Scan QR Code" feature, and is used to redirect to the system scanning application. The software does not directly use the camera to capture image data.

You can revoke any permission at any time in system settings, but some features may be limited as a result.

2.4 Third-Party Services

This software does not use any third-party analytics, crash reporting, or advertising SDKs, and does not actively collect your device information or usage behavior.

3. User Obligations and Code of Conduct

3.1 You shall not use this software to store, sync, or share any content that violates laws and regulations (including but not limited to endangering national security, pornography, or infringing on others' intellectual property rights).

3.2 You bear full legal responsibility for your note content and sharing behavior. The developer does not perform any form of pre-review of user-generated content and shall not be liable for direct or indirect consequences caused by illegal or infringing content.

4. Disclaimer

4.1 Data Loss Risk

This software provides cloud backup and local backup services. Please regularly back up your data to other secure locations. The developer is not liable for data loss caused by device failure, accidental deletion, system corruption, virus attacks, or improper operation.

4.2 LAN Sync Reliability

LAN sync depends on the stability of your local network environment. The developer is not liable for sync failure or data corruption caused by router configuration, network firewall, device compatibility, or other issues.

4.3 Backup Restore Risk

Restoring a backup will overwrite all note data on the current device. It is recommended to manually export your current data as a backup before restoring. The developer is not liable for data loss or conflicts caused by restore operations.

4.4 Open Source and Security

All source code of this software is open source (repository: https://github.com/VilinkoStudio/Synap). Some components may be based on third-party open source code. The developer has exercised reasonable care but does not guarantee against any potential security vulnerabilities or third-party malicious code.

If you believe any open source code used in this software infringes on your intellectual property rights or other legal rights, please contact us through the contact information in Section 7 of this agreement. We will verify and take necessary measures promptly upon receiving your notice.

5. Agreement Modification and Termination

5.1 The developer reserves the right to update this agreement. Modified agreements will be notified through in-app announcements or update logs. Continued use of this software constitutes acceptance of the modifications.

5.2 If you violate the code of conduct in this agreement, the developer reserves the right to restrict or terminate your use of this software and cloud sync services (if any).

6. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution

The interpretation, validity, and dispute resolution of this agreement are governed by the laws of mainland China. Any disputes arising from this agreement or the use of this software shall first be resolved through friendly negotiation. If negotiation fails, you agree to submit to the court with jurisdiction at the developer's location.

7. Contact Us

If you have any questions, suggestions, or data security concerns about this agreement, please contact us through the contact information provided on our official website (https://www.vilinko.com/).

Thank you for using this software. May every record you make be safe and secure.
